results.reason: Import functionality requires native file dialog which agent-browser cannot capture. Database is in-memory sql.js and not directly accessible for inspection.

results.evidence: AspekKerjaListPage shows columns: Kode, Nama, COA Kode, COA Nama, Jenis, Status. Text extraction shows: 'NoKodeNamaCOA KodeCOA NamaJenisStatusAksi' and data rows show correct COA linkage (AK-001→111 Kas Besar, AK-002→121 Bank BCA, AK-003→510 Beban Gaji).
